## [See Also](/documentation/ModelIO/MDLSubmesh/indexBuffer(asIndexType:)#see-also)

### [Working with a Submesh’s Index Buffer](/documentation/ModelIO/MDLSubmesh/indexBuffer(asIndexType:)#Working-with-a-Submeshs-Index-Buffer)

[`var indexBuffer: any MDLMeshBuffer`](/documentation/modelio/mdlsubmesh/indexbuffer)An object that provides index data for the submesh.[`var indexCount: Int`](/documentation/modelio/mdlsubmesh/indexcount)The number of indices in the submesh’s index buffer.[`var indexType: MDLIndexBitDepth`](/documentation/modelio/mdlsubmesh/indextype)The data type for each element in the submesh’s index buffer.[`var geometryType: MDLGeometryType`](/documentation/modelio/mdlsubmesh/geometrytype)The type of geometric primitives described by the submesh’s index buffer.[`var topology: MDLSubmeshTopology?`](/documentation/modelio/mdlsubmesh/topology)A description of how the non-uniform layout of the submesh’s index buffer defines the shape of the mesh.
